nasb.text: because the mind set on the flesh is hostile toward God; for it does not subject itself to the law of God, for it is not even able to do so,

esv.text: For the mind that is set on the flesh is hostile to God, for it does not submit to God’s law; indeed, it cannot.

cnv.text: 因為以肉體為念就是與　神為仇，既不服從　神的律法，也的確不能夠服從；

ccb.text: 因为顾念罪恶本性的人与上帝为敌，不服从上帝的律法，也无力服从。

csbs.text: 原来属肉体的思想是敌对神的，因为它不服从神的律法，其实也不能服从；
